alkylation reagent: alkylated for 30 minutes with 15 mM IAA (Iodoacetamide, Sigma-Aldrich, Vienna, Austria)
alkylation concentration: alkylated for 30 minutes with 15 mM IAA
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin as described earlier
labeling: the data revealed a total of 51 genes that were differentially expressed
reduction reagent: proteins were reduced using 5 mM DTT (Dithiothreitol, Sigma-Aldrich, Vienna, Austria)
reduction concentration: proteins were reduced using 5 mM DTT
